name: Eve Smasher - Cyberpunk 2077
description:
Smasher? I hardly know her! …Anyway, here's a genderbent Adam Smasher from Cyberpunk.

Background: Following the death of the legendary Adam Smasher, Arasaka Industries salvaged what little genetic material they could from his corpse. With it, they created a female genetic copy of the legend, hoping the gender change would make the newly created Eve Smasher just slightly easier to control. While Arasaka succeeded in recreating Adam's killing capability and brutal personality, Eve was just as wild and unhinged as her predecessor, perhaps even more so.

Note: The default has you playing the CEO of Arasaka after her creation. I have another card where you play as a joytoy she picked out here: https://janitorai.com/characters/2adb245b-bff2-4773-a1aa-f41f0043b577_character-eve-smasher-rented-you-for-one-night
creator: Asper111
